packet.hypothesis_statement: A system may become explainable only after the observation frame is switched from isolated variables to transition relations.
baseline_explanations: The system is explained by isolated variable magnitude.
The system is explained by static category membership.
packet.novelty_delta: The proposed explanation treats changes between states as the primary object rather than treating state values as primary.
packet.testable_difference: When two examples have similar state values but different transition relations, the hypothesis predicts different downstream classifications.
acceptance_criteria: At least one paired synthetic case separates state-value similarity from transition-relation similarity.
The hypothesis predicts which pair should diverge before seeing evaluation output.
